untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Ornstein-Uhlenbeck model fitting and mean-reversion coefficient (theta) calculation via OLS regression on lagged deviations from mean. These are statistical model parameters not available in the allowed indicator set. The half-life calculation (-ln(2)/theta) cannot be computed from standard technical indicators. Additionally, the signal specifies a pair spread (GLD-GDX) which requires cross-asset analysis not supported by single-security indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a statistical arbitrage strategy requiring custom model fitting rather than technical indicator thresholds. The entry condition should detect mean-reversion behavior (negative returns suggest deviation from mean), and exit after ~10 days. However, without access to OU model parameters or spread calculations, a true translation is not possible within the constraint of allowed indicators. A proxy using log_returns and moving average crossover is provided but does not capture the intended mean-reversion detection mechanism.
